name: material-ui-tailwind
tagline: Guides integrating Material UI v4 with Tailwind CSS via cascade layers, slotProps className, and theme token bridges.
verdict: Compact, well-scoped entry skill that defers bulk detail to AGENTS.md/reference.md, is versioned, and states clear trigger situations. Only real gap: no stated exclusions for when not to use it.

highlights.summary: No "NOT for" or exclusion text anywhere in description or body.
